name: afix-platform
description: Plataforma de Gestão Inteligente de Atendimento via WhatsApp | ISO 25010 Compliant

scripts.build: npm run build -w @afix/shared && npm run build -w @afix/backend && npm run build -w @afix/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @afix/shared && npm run test -w @afix/backend && npm run test -w @afix/frontend
